text:
Once upon a time, in a small lakeside town nestled between lush green forests and twinkling stars, lived a curious old owl named Owlly.

Every morning, before anyone else was awake, Owlly would sweep through the dew-lined grasses under his owl condo. He loved discovering secrets hidden in plain sight. One sunny day, he stumbled upon a dusty, antique mirror propped against a weathered tree.

Wanting to see his reflection under such mysteriousware, Owlly peered into it. What he saw shocked him. Instead of feathers, he saw dark scales. Confused and amused, he fluttered about, watching his image leap around. Suddenly, it roared! Owlly couldn'd believe it. He chuckled softly and continued his exploration.

That evening, he heard peculiar whispers in the wind. They sounded like ancient secrets. Owlly listened closely. Then, out of nowhere, he heard a whisper calling him. "Join us."
